task.label: Ensure that applicants undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is issued for the first time

exception.description: for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE, Member States may apply alternative measures instead

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is issued for the first time

exception.description: for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE, alternative measures may apply instead

task.label: Require a medical examination for categories C, CE, C1, C1E, D, D1, DE or D1E

conditions.condition: application for driving licence of categories C, CE, C1, C1E, D, D1, DE or D1E
regardless of whether a medical examination was undertaken for another category

task.label: Undergo a medical examination before renewal

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is renewed

exception.description: for category AM, applies only if required by the Member State in question
for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE, alternative measures may apply instead

task.label: Require applicant or holder to fill in a self-assessment form

conditions.condition: for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE
as alternative to medical examination required in paragraphs 1 and 2
to the extent not otherwise provided for
if required by Member State
when applying for issuance or renewal of a driving licence
for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE

task.label: Establish a national system of assessment of fitness to drive

conditions.condition: for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE
as alternative to medical examination required in paragraphs 1 and 2
to the extent not otherwise provided for

task.label: Provide for appropriate measures for false self-assessment information or non-compliance
Apply the alternative measure to allow monitoring of fitness to drive

conditions.condition: under point (b)
during periods of administrative validity

task.label: Ensure that applicant or holder undergoes a medical examination

conditions.condition: if it becomes apparent that the applicant or holder is likely to have one or more of the medical conditions listed
on the basis of information acquired pursuant to the alternative measures

task.label: Undergo a medical examination prior to issuing or renewing the driving licence

conditions.condition: if it becomes apparent that the applicant or holder is likely to have one or more of the medical conditions listed
prior to issuing or renewing the driving licence

task.label: Inform the Commission of adopted guidelines

conditions.condition: if Member States adopt guidelines for medical practitioners

task.label: Make guidelines available to other Member States

conditions.condition: after being informed by Member States of adopted guidelines

task.label: Inform the Commission of public awareness campaigns

conditions.condition: if Member States develop public awareness campaigns about health conditions that may impair fitness to drive

task.label: Make campaign information available to other Member States

conditions.condition: after being informed by Member States of public awareness campaigns

task.label: Set stricter standards for issuance or renewal of driving licences
